tool.name: EnzyWizard Dock
tool.description: Perform molecular docking of one or multiple substrates with a cleaned protein structure
tool.command: ln -s '$input_name' '$input_name.name' && mkdir -p substrate_dir && unzip -q '$substrate_zip' -d substrate_dir && enzywizard-dock -i '$input_name.name' -s '$substrate_names' -d substrate_dir -o ./ --max_docking_attempt_num '$advanced.docking.max_docking_attempt_num' $advanced.docking.no_early_stop --exhaustiveness '$advanced.docking.exhaustiveness' --cpu "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" --min_rad '$advanced.pocket.min_rad' --max_rad '$advanced.pocket.max_rad' --min_volume '$advanced.pocket.min_volume' #if $advanced.docking_box.catalytic_residue: --catalytic_residue '$advanced.docking_box.catalytic_residue' #end if #if $advanced.docking_box.catalytic_site_coord: --catalytic_site_coord '$advanced.docking_box.catalytic_site_coord' #end if #if $advanced.docking_box.box_size: --box_size '$advanced.docking_box.box_size' #end if > log.txt

expand.name: substrate_zip
expand.label: Substrate directory (zip)
expand.help: Substrate SDF zip from EnzyWizard Substrate

param.label: Disable early stop
param.help: Continue after the first successful docking result

param.label: Manual center residue
param.help: Use this residue CA as box center

param.label: Manual center coordinate
param.help: Use this x,y,z coordinate as box center

tool.help:
**What it does**
EnzyWizard Dock performs AutoDock Vina docking between a cleaned protein structure and one or more prepared substrates. It can use detected binding pockets, a global fallback box, or a manually specified docking box centered on a catalytic residue or coordinate.
**Inputs**
* **Cleaned protein structure**: cleaned CIF or PDB structure. * **Substrate names or SMILES**: semicolon-separated substrate names matching SDF files in the substrate zip. * **Substrate directory (zip)**: archive containing SDF files generated by EnzyWizard Substrate. * **Docking options**: docking attempts, Vina exhaustiveness, pocket-detection settings, and optional manual docking-box center/size.
**Outputs**
* Docked protein-substrate CIF and PDB structures. * JSON report named like ``dock_report_*.json`` containing docking result and binding affinity. * Collection of docked SDF substrate files. * Optional log file.
**Manual docking box**
Provide either a cleaned catalytic residue index or a catalytic-site coordinate, not both. When either is supplied, **Box size** is required.
